message:
fix: remove spurious lifetime annotations and add missing table variables

- markdown.rs: Text and Line are non-generic owned types; remove all
  <'static> annotations from return types, struct fields, and helper
  functions. Only Span<'static> is correct (Span still has a lifetime).
- table.rs: add rows_height, rows_top, rows_max_y variable definitions
  that were missing from the render method, causing compilation errors.
  Also type-annotate accumulated_height as u16 to resolve ambiguity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
